data.description: NORTH KOREA'S KIM YO JONG SAYS IMPROVEMENT IN INTER-KOREAN RELATIONS IS AN ILLUSION - REPORTS

data.title: InBloom Autism Services opens 3 new centers in Connecticut for children under 5 with autism, expanding ABA therapy.
data.description: In an effort to enhance their services, InBloom Autism Services has announced the establishment of three additional Learning Centers in Connecticut. These centers are dedicated to providing center-based ABA therapy for children who are aged five and under and have been diagnosed with autism spectrum disorder (ASD). The expansion, which was unveiled on January 13, 2026, in Hartford, Connecticut, signifies a significant step towards reaching more individuals in need of specialized care.

data.title: Breaker introduces TruSend™ unified email platform to improve marketing targeting and engagement, addressing tool overload.
data.description: Breaker has launched TruSend™ in reaction to the division of marketing tech stacks. TruSend™ is a consolidated email distribution platform designed to improve targeting and engagement. By tackling the problems associated with using numerous tools simultaneously, Breaker's innovative technology provides marketers with up-to-the-minute insights.

data.title: MDVIP adds 2 primary care practices in the Capital Region: Saratoga Springs and Slingerlands, NY.
data.description: In a recent announcement on January 13, 2026, MDVIP revealed that two medical practices in the Capital District have become part of its network. Dr. Sanjay Taneja in Saratoga Springs, NY, and Dr. Joanne Van Woert in Slingerlands, NY are now affiliated with MDVIP. Dr. Van Woert initiated her practice in Slingerlands, adding to the growing network of healthcare providers. This expansion showcases MDVIP's commitment to enhancing accessible and personalized healthcare options in the region.

data.title: Dow dropped before CPI report; Delta's stock plummeted on earnings. Post by Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: On Tuesday, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline in anticipation of the upcoming CPI inflation report. Delta Airlines' stock also plummeted following their earnings announcement. Live coverage of the stock market today highlighted the Dow's fall and Delta's earnings impact.

data.title: A2Gold reports drilling 2.9 g/t gold over 20m at McIntosh Zone, adds 70m of mineralization at depth. #A2Gold #goldmining
data.description: A2Gold Corp. has released assay results from three core drill holes at its Eastside Gold–Silver Project in Tonopah, Nevada. The company reported 70 meters of mineralization at depth. The project is 100% owned by A2Gold and the company trades on the TSXV under the symbol AUAU and on the OTCQX under the symbol AUXXF.

data.title: PTx Winter Conference in Tremont, Illinois, gathers AGCO leaders, farmers, and experts to discuss ag innovations.
data.description: An event taking place in Tremont, Illinois, is set to unite PTx leaders, agronomists, forward-thinking farmers, and industry specialists. AGCO, a worldwide agricultural machinery and precision ag technology frontrunner, has revealed the revival of the PTx™ Winter gathering in DULUTH, Ga., as of January 13, 2026. AGCO, identified on NYSE as AGCO, is renowned for its prowess in the agricultural sector.

data.title: ADP report: US private employers added 11,750 jobs/week for 4 weeks ending Dec 20, 2025, an increase from previous months.
data.description: In Roseland, New Jersey on January 13, 2026, it was reported that U.S. private employers added an average of 11,750 jobs per week for the four weeks leading up to December 20, 2025, as per the NER Pulse. This information is derived from the monthly ADP National Employment Report (NER). The rate of job growth slightly increased compared to the previous period.

data.title: ACS releases annual report showing milestone 70% 5-year survival rate for all cancers; largest gains for advanced cases. 75th year of analyzing data.
data.description: In its 75th year of analyzing and sharing cancer data, the American Cancer Society published Cancer Statistics, 2026. This report serves as an annual update on the latest findings in the field of cancer research and public health. The release of this data occurred on January 13, 2026, in Atlanta. This marks a significant milestone for the ACS in its ongoing mission to improve public health and combat cancer.

data.title: Decoy Therapeutics partners with Gates Foundation for peptide-conjugate antiviral access in low- and middle-income countries.
data.description: Decoy Therapeutics has secured funding from the Gates Foundation to utilize their platform in making peptide-conjugate antivirals from Decoy's IMP3ACT™ accessible for low- and middle-income nations. The initiative, announced on Jan. 13, 2026, in CAMBRIDGE, Mass. and HOUSTON, aims to provide these treatments on a wider scale.

data.title: Hand on Heart's non-alcoholic wine offers flavor, ritual, and support for Susan G. Komen® with California grapes.
data.description: Produced using grapes from California, the high-quality alcohol-free wines provide taste, tradition, and harmony, all while contributing towards the support of Susan G. Komen®. Based in SANTA BARBARA, Calif., on Jan. 13, 2026, Miller Family Wine Co.'s upscale non-alcoholic wine label, Hand on Heart, is delighted to...

data.title: Salad and Go introduces 2026 menu with 50g protein 'Big AZ' burrito, reviving popular options.
data.description: Salad and Go is reintroducing the popular Good Greens Salad and Wrap, along with the new 'Big AZ' breakfast burrito boasting over 50 grams of protein. This move comes as part of the drive-thru chain's commitment to offering fresh, healthy meals at prices that won't break the bank. The chain, based in Dallas, announced these menu additions on January 13, 2026, marking a step towards providing customers with more options that cater to their nutritional needs. This includes the return of the beloved salad items and the introduction of a protein-packed breakfast choice, in line with Salad and Go's mission to redefine fast food.

data.title: ZKsync reveals 2026 plan for privacy & institutional adoption, targeting banks & enterprises with production-ready infrastructure.
data.description: In 2026, ZKsync is transitioning its strategy from experimental to established infrastructure aimed at banks, enterprises, and regulated financial systems. This shift is indicative of a move towards providing reliable services for these sectors.

data.title: DOGE price aims $0.16 resistance with neutral momentum in Jan 2026. Short-term target $0.16, medium-term range $0.13-$0.16, support $0.13.
data.description: A summary of DOGE price predictions indicates a short-term target of $0.16 within 1 week. The medium-term forecast for a month suggests DOGE will range between $0.13 and $0.16. The bullish breakout level is set at $0.16, while the critical support level stands at $0.13.

data.title: Aquilance secures $16M investment to expand family office solutions for financial advisors, firms, and trust companies.
data.description: Aquilance has secured a new capital infusion to cater to the increasing needs of financial advisors and clients with $10 million or more in assets across large enterprise wealth management firms, RIAs, and trust companies. This funding will also expedite the progress of its innovative TRUMBULL platform. The announcement was made on January 13, 2026, in Connecticut.

data.title: Delta Air Lines reports Q4 revenue of $16.003B with $1.86 GAAP EPS, exceeding estimates and showing positive trends for 2026.
data.description: Delta Air Lines reported its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year 2025, with GAAP operating revenue reaching $16.003 billion, a 3% increase from the previous year. The company's GAAP diluted EPS was $1.86. Adjusted earnings for the fourth quarter were $1.55 per share, surpassing Wall Street's estimate of $1.53. Revenue for the quarter also exceeded expectations, climbing to $16.003 billion, above the $15.585 billion consensus forecast. Operating income totaled $1.5 billion, with a margin of 9.2%, down from 11.0% the previous year. Adjusted operating margin was reported at 10.1%, compared to 12.0% in the prior year. Passenger revenue saw a 1% increase to $12.916 billion, while cargo revenue declined by 1% to $246 million. Other revenue increased by 14% to $2.841 billion. Available seat miles grew by 1.3% to 72.9 billion, revenue passenger miles declined by 1% to 59.9 billion, and the passenger load factor decreased from 84% to 82% year over year. Total revenue per available seat mile was 21.94 cents, with adjusted TRASM at 20.02 cents. The company cited improving demand trends and cost discipline for its guidance for the March quarter and full year 2026.

data.title: US Synthetic grants limited license for high-performance PDC - settles IP dispute at ITC, provides lawful access to products.
data.description: US Synthetic Corporation, a prominent supplier of polycrystalline diamond cutters for oil and gas drilling based in Orem, Utah, has reached a resolution in an intellectual property conflict stemming from the International Trade Commission (ITC). President Rob Galloway announced that a licensing agreement has been established to safeguard the company's intellectual property rights while enabling customers to legally access specific mid-tier products. This move comes after the dispute at the ITC, providing a lawful and approved solution.

data.title: North American and European manufacturers' purchasing declines in December, signaling slower conditions for them heading into 2026. Asian manufacturers, especially in China, South Korea, and Vietnam, show more resilience.
data.description: Continued decline in factory purchasing activity in North America and Europe indicates a worsening short-term forecast for Western manufacturers. In contrast, Asian producers are displaying strength, with consistent demand in China and expanding markets in South Korea and Vietnam. The report from Jan. 13, 2026, highlights the contrasting trends, with North American and European sectors struggling while Asian economies show resilience and growth.
